outlook.volatilityExpectation: Elevated - Spot in breakout territory above all visible strikes

Monthly reverse_smirk skew confirms bullish momentum. All OI at zero suggests pure intraday speculation. Volume clusters at 6400 and 6300 now act as dynamic support levels.
